#ffffff);labelBorderColor=none;strokeColor=none;" value="<div>TD-Gamma Variant</div><div><br></div>$$y_t = \lambda^{N-t}\,\hat{V}_\theta(s_{t+1}) + \left(1 - \lambda^{N-t}\right) z, \qquad \lambda \in (0,1)$$" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="330" x="350" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NtY2WF2Gqw07VBEODz2Z-29" edge="1" parent="1" source="NtY2WF2Gqw07VBEODz2Z-26" id="NtY2WF2Gqw07VBEODz2Z-26" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#000099);fontColor=light-dark(#000000, #ffffff);labelBorderColor=none;strokeColor=none;" value="<div>Loss</div>$$\mathcal{L}(\theta) = \mathbb{E}_{(s_t, t, N, z) \sim \mathcal{D}}\left[\left(\hat{V}_\theta(s_t) - y_t\right)^2\right]$$" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="330" x="249" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
